page.body:
XF_OPTIONPAD_START
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_TITLE(Nowy dokument zakupu,7)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_START XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Faktura zakupu,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK varCursor=CRSR_ZAKUP_PO_REJ) XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Faktura zakupu + VAT RR,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK_RR varCursor=CRSR_ZAKUP_PO_REJ) XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_END
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_SEPARATOR(7)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_TITLE(Korekty,7)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_START XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Korekta zakupu,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP , varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=OPTION_PAD_KOREKTA varNewThread=1 appvar_optpad_call_from=THIS_FILE appvar_optpad_call_from_pop=0 appvar_optpad_call_from_pop_pop=0 vs1=N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK vs2=0) XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM_EXTRA_COLSPAN(Korekta zakupu + VAT RR,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP , href='varFunctionHLI="fire_hli" vs1="varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=OPTION_PAD_KOREKTA varNewThread=1 appvar_optpad_call_from=THIS_FILE appvar_optpad_call_from_pop=0 appvar_optpad_call_from_pop_pop=0 vs1=N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK_RR vs2=0"',2) XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_END
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_SEPARATOR(7)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_TITLE(Import i WNT,7)
XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_START XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(WNT,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK_WNT varCursor=CRSR_ZAKUP_PO_REJ) #ifdef ENABLE_DB14_A XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Import usług,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK_IMPORT_USLUG varCursor=CRSR_ZAKUP_PO_REJ) #endif XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Import spoza UE,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP, OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0) appvar_rejestr_typ=N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP varCursor=CRSR_ZAKUP_PO_REJ) XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Korekta WNT,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP , varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=OPTION_PAD_KOREKTA varNewThread=1 appvar_optpad_call_from=THIS_FILE appvar_optpad_call_from_pop=0 appvar_optpad_call_from_pop_pop=0 vs1=N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WNT vs2=0) #ifdef ENABLE_DB14_A XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Korekta importu usług,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP , varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=OPTION_PAD_KOREKTA varNewThread=1 appvar_optpad_call_from=THIS_FILE appvar_optpad_call_from_pop=0 appvar_optpad_call_from_pop_pop=0 vs1=N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_IMPORT_USLUG vs2=0) #endif XF_OPTIONPAD_ITEM(Korekta importu spoza UE,PICTURE_BUTTON_N5ZAKUP , varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=OPTION_PAD_KOREKTA varNewThread=1 appvar_optpad_call_from=THIS_FILE appvar_optpad_call_from_pop=0 appvar_optpad_call_from_pop_pop=0 vs1=N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP vs2=0) XF_OPTIONPAD_GROUP_END
XF_OPTIONPAD_END
XFBACK(Wstecz)
